no: RESOURCE FOLDER ONLY — no tp2, no installable components. This is the original TDD v1.14 resource pack containing BAMs, areas, creatures, sounds, etc. Must be extracted to the game folder BEFORE installing TDDz (i=521). TDDz.tp2 hardcodes paths like COPY ~TDD/Bam~ ~override~, so a folder called TDD/ must exist alongside TDDz/. Download from SHS: shsforums.net/files/file/323-the-darkest-day-v114/

in.t: Extract the TDD/ resource folder to your game directory before installing The Darkest Day (TDDZ).

conflicts.reason: Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 1062 vs 736)

dependencies.reason: Reported as requirement by LCC-docs database (lcc id 1062 requires 1229)

sum: Required dependency for TDDz (EET installer). Download from SHS, do not install directly — TDDz handles installation.
